frameworks.name: hidden state inference
frameworks.one_line: Remapping reflects subjective beliefs about the latent context state of the environment.

frameworks.name: place cell remapping
frameworks.one_line: Classical remapping phenomena reformulated as readouts of inferred hidden context.

core_question: What computational principle determines when and how hippocampal place cells remap across contexts?
key_assumptions: Context is a hidden latent variable the animal must infer rather than directly observe
Place cell tuning reflects subjective belief states, not objective environmental features
manipulations: Type and degree of context change considered across remapping phenomena
key_findings: Different remapping phenomena can be unified under a single hidden-state inference account
The framework resolves ambiguities about what counts as a context change and how tuning relates to it
interpretations: Remapping is a signature of inference over latent context rather than a direct response to observable change
